emails.subject: Re: Akzo Nobel, Inc. Confirmation Letter
emails.body: Re: Akzo Nobel, Inc. Confirmation Letter Dan, Instead of saying that the customer has just 10 days written notice to get out of the deal, we should add something to this effect "subject to the monthly deadline established by Southern California Gas Company for terminating authorized marketer arrangements." Let me know if you have any quesitons 503-464-3826 or cell 503-805-2117. Thanks, Kim Dan J Hyvl 01/08/2001 02:01 PM

emails.subject: Akzo Nobel, Inc. Confirmation Letter
emails.body: Akzo Nobel, Inc. Confirmation Letter Kim, Please review the attached confirmation letter to see if it correctly reflects your transaction. Please call if you have any questions.

emails.subject: Re: Akzo Nobel, Inc. Confirmation Letter
emails.body: Kim, This appears a little too iffy. Please get with SCGC to find out the notice period. If it is greater than 10 days then we will change our language to the greater notice period. If less, we will leave our notice period at 10 days prior to the month. Please call if you would care to discuss. Kim Ward 01/08/2001 05:01 PM

emails.subject: Re: Akzo Nobel, Inc. Confirmation Letter
emails.body: Re: Akzo Nobel, Inc. Confirmation Letter The above letter has been modified to reflect that Buyer may terminate by providing notice to Seller at least five days prior to the date established by SoCalGas for terminating authorized marketer arrangements.
